executive_summary: PRD 003 (Image-to-Video via parallax-cli) is fully implemented. The `create video` command in `packages/parallax_cli/src/index.ts` correctly adds the `--input` flag, validates file existence, selects the appropriate i2v script for all four model families (ltx2, ltx23, wan21, wan22), and applies all per-model flag-forwarding rules (--input→--image, --cfg→--cfg-pass1 for ltx2, --steps omitted for ltx23). The `spawnPipeline` helper is reused for subprocess dispatch with inherited stdio and proper exit-code propagation. TypeScript typecheck passes with zero errors.
minor_observations: The --cfg-pass1 / --steps-omission logic is applied unconditionally for the ltx2 and ltx23 models (both t2v and i2v paths share the same branch), which is correct and consistent with how the scripts expose their interfaces. No regression introduced.
The --input option description text mentions all four model names inline ('ltx2, ltx23, wan21, wan22'), which is helpful but may need updating if new models are added in future iterations.
No automated tests are included for the i2v dispatch paths. Per project convention this is intentional (tests written during the Refactor phase), but should be tracked as a follow-up.
conclusions_and_recommendations: All 12 functional requirements and all 5 user stories fully comply. The implementation is clean and leverages the existing spawnPipeline helper without duplication. Recommended next steps: (1) add unit/integration tests for the i2v dispatch table and flag-forwarding logic in the upcoming Refactor phase; (2) consider extracting the per-model flag-forwarding logic into a dedicated helper or lookup table to reduce the growing conditional chain in the action handler as more models are added.
